2606.22296.title: SCENIC: Semantic-Conditioned Edge-Aware Neural Framework for Structured IoT Command Generation
2606.22296.paper_summary: Edge Internet of Things (IoT) agents are often constrained by memory capacity, privacy requirements, communication latency, and recurring inference cost. Current smart-home assistants commonly rely on API-level command interfaces or cloud-based language models that remain difficult to deploy on edge devices. This paper addresses edge IoT command generation as a many-to-one structured output task, where multiple natural-language instructions map to the same canonical command string for deterministic smart-home parsing. To support this setting, we propose Semantic-Conditioned Edge-Aware Neural Framework for Structured IoT Command Generation (SCENIC), an end-to-end framework covering model architecture selection, Smart Home Instruct data generation, triplet-loss contrastive supervised fine-tuning, pruning and quantization, and deployment-oriented export. We evaluate sub-0.2B-scale transformer backbones, which are, to the best of our knowledge, among the smallest language-model backbones studied for edge IoT structured command generation. On Smart Home Instruct-Bench, the strongest dense decoder-only row reaches 99.0% EM@1, while the encoder-decoder model retains stronger high-sparsity behavior. A representative pruned INT8 encoder-decoder export preserves 91.0% EM@1 and 99.0% EM@5 while reducing exported model size by 25.38%. TensorRT profiling of the NVIDIA 2:4 sparse encoder export further shows up to 1.8x encoder-component speedup, indicating that the selected encoder-decoder deployment path can retain structured command accuracy under edge-oriented compression while hardware acceleration evidence remains component-level. The SCENIC code and experimental artifacts are open sourced to support reproducibility.
2606.22296.paper_summary_zh: 邊緣物聯網 (IoT) 代理通常受到記憶體容量、隱私要求、通訊延遲和重複推斷成本的限制。當前的智慧家庭助手通常依賴於 API 級別的命令介面或基於雲的語言模型，這些在邊緣設備上部署仍然困難。本文將邊緣 IoT 命令生成視為一個多對一的結構化輸出任務，其中多個自然語言指令映射到相同的標準命令字串，以便於確定性智慧家庭解析。為了支持這一設定，我們提出了語義條件邊緣感知神經框架，用於結構化 IoT 命令生成 (SCENIC)，這是一個端到端的框架，涵蓋模型架構選擇、智慧家庭指令數據生成、三元組損失對比監督微調、修剪和量化，以及面向部署的導出。我們評估了小於 0.2B 的Transformer骨幹，據我們所知，這是研究邊緣 IoT 結構化命令生成的最小語言模型骨幹之一。在智慧家庭指令基準中，最強的稠密解碼器僅行達到 99.0% EM@1，而編碼器-解碼器模型則保持更強的高稀疏性行為。一個代表性的修剪後 INT8 編碼器-解碼器導出保留了 91.0% EM@1 和 99.0% EM@5，同時將導出模型大小減少了 25.38%。NVIDIA 2:4 稀疏編碼器導出的 TensorRT 性能分析進一步顯示編碼器組件速度提升高達 1.8 倍，這表明所選的編碼器-解碼器部署路徑可以在邊緣導向壓縮下保持結構化命令的準確性，同時硬體加速證據仍然是組件級別的。SCENIC 代碼和實驗材料已開源，以支持可重現性。
2606.22296.author: Luke Ztz Hu et.al.
2606.22296.authors: Luke Ztz Hu, Hongbing Lang, Songping Mai
